claim_boundary: this evidence bundle covers one bounded article-Transformer training lane over two toy sequence tasks, a finite-difference optimizer loop, and deterministic checkpoint restore on the canonical owned stack. It does not claim full-parameter article training, benchmark parity, or final article-equivalence green status.
